---
name: new rewrite proposal
about: propose adding a new equivalence-preserving rewrite
labels: enhancement
---

**rewrite name and description**
e.g. "ZX-calculus phase-fusion: combine adjacent rotations of the same axis"

**identity proven (paper, ZX rule, etc.)**

**preserves what (full unitary, up-to-global-phase, etc.)**

**have you written a test?**
this is required. use `quark.verify.equiv` against at least 5 random small circuits before opening the PR.
